title: Company van double booked; how to notify operations manager when this happens

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Meet Sarah, the operations manager at a growing landscaping company with a fleet of five vans used by crews for daily jobs. Booking columns track the van, date and time slots, assigned crew, and job details.

Landscape job board setup1074×160 24.4 KB

One busy Monday, two crews show up, only to realise there’s only one van available! The tree removal crew is delayed, the client is upset, and Sarah spends the next hour scrambling to rearrange schedules and apologise to the client.

Calendar showing Van #1 is in use during two concurrent jobs798×296 25.4 KB

This really affected the company’s reputation, and Sarah’s not feeling great about it. Staying late, she discovers Automato’s scheduling conflict automation in the marketplace:


Next to Status columns, this automation also works with People and Dropdown columns.

With this setup, Sarah is now notified which item caused the resource conflict, and can follow the notification to the conflicting item. She can also combine the automation with any other action, like sending an email, or changing a status.

Monday notification linking to the item that caused the double booking588×143 10 KB

Now she can adjust the scheduling early, and arrange for an alternative van for the job. Disaster prevented!

Avoid double bookings with Automato

Automato on monday marketplace | Complete automation reference
